emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the Oranmore Lodge Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 59/100
========================================

6 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- No SSL certificate
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 20 inline styles
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No meta description
 HIGH
--------------------
- Not responsive
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No alt text on any image
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Missing footer links


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.detail: The site loads over HTTP only. No encryption means data is sent in plain text.
issues.label: No SSL certificate
issues.check: Does the URL start with http:// instead of https://?
issues.siteHint: Google flags all non-HTTPS sites as 'Not Secure'.

issues.label: 20 inline styles
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: Search results show a generic snippet instead of a compelling description.
issues.label: No meta description
issues.check: Search 'site:[business URL]' on Google. Does the snippet look well-written?
issues.siteHint: Meta descriptions directly impact click-through rates from Google by 5-15%.

issues.detail: The website layout breaks on mobile and tablet screens.
issues.label: Not responsive
issues.check: Resize your browser to 375px width (iPhone SE). Does content overflow?
issues.siteHint: Google penalizes non-responsive sites in mobile search rankings.

issues.detail: Every single image on the site lacks descriptive alt text.
issues.label: No alt text on any image
issues.check: Right-click any image > Inspect. Check if alt attribute exists and has text.
issues.siteHint: Without alt text, image SEO is effectively zero.

issues.detail: The footer lacks important navigation links like Privacy Policy, Terms, and Sitemap.
issues.label: Missing footer links
issues.check: Scroll to the bottom of the page. Are the expected links present?
issues.siteHint: Footer links support SEO and help visitors find key pages.
